name: Grid
description: A composite widget container enabling users to navigate information or interactive elements using directional keys, serving as either a data grid or layout grid.

keyboard_interactions.action: Moves focus one cell to the right
Moves focus one cell to the left
Moves focus down an author-determined number of rows
Moves focus up an author-determined number of rows
Moves focus to the first cell in the current row
Moves focus to the last cell in the current row
Moves focus to the first cell in the first row
Moves focus to the last cell in the last row
Places focus in editable input field or first widget within cell
Places focus in input field; subsequent F2 restores grid navigation
Restores grid navigation; may undo edits

required_attributes.description: Provides accessible name for the grid

optional_attributes.description: Total columns when some are hidden
Total rows when some are hidden

notes: For non-interactive tabular data, use the table pattern instead
Layout grids may optionally wrap focus at row/column boundaries
Grid has two interaction modes: navigation mode (arrow keys) and edit mode (Enter/F2)
